title: Expressing support for the withdrawal of the United States from the Paris Agreement.
plain_summary: This congressional resolution supports the President's decision to pull the United States out of the Paris Agreement. The Paris Agreement is a deal that many countries around the world made in 2015 to work together on climate issues. Congress is saying they agree with leaving this international climate agreement.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Foreign Affairs.

sections.title: Concurrent Resolution
sections.text: Congress supports the President's decision to pull the United States out of the Paris Agreement. The Paris Agreement means the climate deal that world leaders agreed to at the twenty-first meeting of countries in Paris, France on December twelfth, two thousand fifteen. This meeting was part of the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change.
